mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  A[Literature Review] --> B[Hypothesis Formation]
  B --> C[Study Design]
  C --> D[Data Collection]
  C --> E[Ethical Approval]
  D --> F[Data Analysis]
  E --> F
  F --> G[Results Interpretation]
  G --> H[Publication]

  style A fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7,color:#0369a1
  style B fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#2563eb,color:#1e40af
  style C fill:#c7d2fe,stroke:#4f46e5,color:#3730a3
  style D fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706,color:#92400e
  style E fill:#fce7f3,stroke:#db2777,color:#9d174d
  style F fill:#d1fae5,stroke:#059669,color:#065f46
  style G fill:#a7f3d0,stroke:#10b981,color:#065f46
  style H fill:#6ee7b7,stroke:#059669,color:#064e3b
